creator: phil.stone@gmx.com
text:
Hi,
I've just installed pkg-1.2.3 on FreeBSD 8.4-RELEASE-p6.

Running the command "pkg audit -F" causes a segfault:
# pkg audit -F
Vulnxml file up-to-date.
Segmentation fault (core dumped)
#

Fix: Implementing the following patch solves the issue:
How-To-Repeat: 100% repeatable: just type 'pkg audit -F' on the command prompt
